reviews.review_text:
Booked the 2 room chalet, it was nice and warm, very clean and tidy. Dish soap, shampoo and body wash were all provided.
Personal parking bays in front of each chalet
There is a well-maintained playground and basketball court at the front of the grounds which provided much entertainment

Service was efficient, with clear instructions.

2 min drive to Hobart airport, super convenient.
Not much aircraft noise at all.

Nearby seafood restaurant if in a pinch for a meal

First time staying in a tourist park, thanks for the lovely experience!
Had our final stay in Tasmania here— what a way to end a fantastic adventure. Was my 50th birthday celebration— the staff added beautiful balloons in our cabin before we fly home to Queensland.
Situated near to Hobart airport. Surrounded by busy roads but traffic quietened down later. Treat yourself to the fish and chip place nearby but get there early if you want to eat in.
Clean, cozy and tidy place near de Hobart airport.

This truly a great place and right at the door step of the Hobart airport . The staff are friendly and helpful, which made the experience even better. The facilities are very clean and well maintained. There’s everything you need, including laundry, a medium-sized cosy camp kitchen, and a large covered outdoor BBQ area. There’s also a vending machine with drinks available.

The kitchen is well equipped with a couple of microwaves, an air fryer, kettles, and toasters. High chairs are provided for children, and cleaning products (including cloths) are available so guests can help keep the area tidy. The stovetop is powerful and easy to use. A big plus—the laundry accepts card payments, which is very convenient.

There is also a free shuttle to the airport.  WiFi is great as well.

A few small suggestion would be to provide labels so guests can mark their food in the fridge. Also to provide baking paper for the BBQ as this keeps it clean.

Also my data was compromised and had to cancel my credit card which was inconvenient when travelling.

Arrive Hobart airport 4pm, stay hete for 1 night at the cabin and collect the rental camper next day as they close at 3pm. This hotel provide shuttle service, they pick us up from airport and drop us at the camper rental area the next morning. The staffs are friendly and helpful, the cabin room is clean, complete with all necessity.

Stayed here with our caravan during the Coastal Caravans Expo and had a fantastic experience. We had a beautiful, nice, even powered site that was easy to drive in and drive out of, which makes life a lot easier when you’re towing.

A special mention to management, Emma and Margie, who were both wonderful. The whole park is absolutely pristine. The gardens, facilities and grounds are incredibly well maintained and everything feels clean and organised.

The camp kitchen was a highlight as well. We had a great time meeting fellow campers there over a glass of vino and chatting about the expo. The Coastal Caravans Expo itself was brilliant with so much choice and variety.

Highly recommend this caravan park if you’re travelling through Hobart. Beautifully run, friendly atmosphere, and a great place to stay with a caravan.

Clean tidy park with level concrete sites for your van and grass next to it for your annex. The toilets, showers, barbecue area and camp kitchen are clean and well laid out. Great play park and jumping pillow. The staff are very helpful. The grounds manager helped with the best place to position our van.

We stayed at the BIG4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park while attending the Coastal Caravans Expo and had a fantastic experience. Manager Emma and her team were incredibly welcoming and helpful from the moment we arrived. The park is beautifully presented with well-kept lawns and lovely gardens. Everything feels organised and cared for. The location is excellent too, right by the airport and only about 15 minutes into Hobart. Would definitely stay again.

We booked in to attend the coastal caravans Expo and so glad we did. Emma and her staff were amazing and clearly take pride in the park. The gardens and green spaces were so well looked after. It's a great spot for families with excellent facilities for kids to run around and enjoy themselves. Top location.

We recently stayed at the BIG4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park while attending the Coastal Caravans Expo, and what a fantastic experience it was. Manager Emma and her team run an incredibly well-organised and welcoming park. The staff are genuinely friendly and helpful, and the whole place is spotless. The camp kitchen has to be the cleanest one we’ve ever seen. The lawns and gardens are beautifully maintained and it’s a lovely environment to relax in. The location is brilliant too, literally next to the airport and only about 15 minutes into Hobart. Plenty of great restaurants nearby as well. Highly recommend this park to anyone visiting the area.

We had our entire team stay at BIG4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park while we were in Hobart running our on-site expo, and it was an outstanding experience.

A massive thank you to Emma, Margo, Ben, Des, Pop, TJ and the whole team for looking after us so well. The hospitality and friendliness from the staff was exceptional from the moment we arrived.

The park itself is absolutely immaculate. Honestly, it has to be one of the cleanest caravan parks in the world. The grounds are beautifully maintained and everything is presented to such a high standard.

The location is fantastic as well, right near the airport and only a short drive into Hobart.

We highly recommend BIG4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park and are already looking forward to staying again next March for the Coastal Caravans Expo.

A wonderful park run by a wonderful team.

Fabulous park. Friendly staff, very clean amenities, great camp kitchen, good sized bays. Nice and quiet even though you are near the airport. Great location, well priced and would definitely stay here again.

Absolute delight to stay here, clean rooms and park, spotless amenities, host is also amazing..
Definitely recommend
Outstanding facility would stay again. Literally our choice of the Big 4 parks we stayed at.
Not only is the park absolutely fantastic for kids and pets, the staff are amazing!

We flew in from Sydney and arrived 4pm. Picked up our rental and headed to Caravan Park which is nearly at the end of the run way and beside the motorway to Hobart CBD.||The cabin was fantastic, lots of room. Two bedrooms, one Queen and 2 bunks. Good kitchen, fridge, TV and Air conditioning. Dining table, chairs and sofa.||Bathroom is smallish but adequate. Shower was on the small side for me but Im a big chap.||Very, very clean. Park grounds are immaculate. Reception were very friendly.||Parking right in front of cabin. Good laundry, kitchen and BBQ area all very clean. I would say this is the cleanest caravan park we've been too in Australia. ||You can hear the jets taking off but it's okay. No noise from the motorway, you basically drive out the gate, turn right then left and you are on it.||Only a few kms each way to shopping centres. We preferred the Eastlands Shopping Centre.||Only a short drive into Hobart.||We stayed 4 nights and will be again at the end of our Tasmanian holiday.

Great stay, just wish there was a TV in the master bedroom.
Very clean rooms, close to AP and fuel for hire car. Great spot!👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

Lots of positives:-Park is well maintained, very clean & tidy. Reception staff are friendly & helpful. The park is ideal for those using the airport. Easy drive into Hobart. Recommendation for improvement:-Park vans & motorhomes on grass so we step out onto the concrete slabs.

Location close to Hobart good central place to stay.
Facilities are good all you need available. Staff wonderful

I booked 2 cabins for 6 guests. We stay there because we have to, not because we want to.  It is not cheap.  The bedroom I had was too small for the bed with hardly room to get out either side & certainly nowhere to put luggage. There are no hooks for towels, no shelves, no bedside tables, no mirror & no air as the only window in the room was locked!!!! As we were limited for time I wanted to use the amenities building but they are locked too.  II am speaking on behalf of all 6 of us.  The best part is the camp kitchen as we were able to sit comfortably as it is too cramped in the cabins.

Good for airport but difficult for city without a car. 20 minutes walk to hourly bus which ends at 6 pm.
Lovely cabins, good facilities.
Limited groceries available at nearby garage, nearest grocers 35 minutes walk 😕
Great play area for kids.
Restaurant in nearby hotel.
Quiet at night considering nearby airport and motorway.
Overall very comfortable 👍
Great sized cabin and close to the airport making it a great last stop. Plenty of activities for the kids in the complex too.

Well positioned park with great facilities. It is clean, tidy and has everything needed. They do pick ups and drop offs to the airport too. The staff are super helpful and go out of their way to help. Special thanks to staff member Amanda who made an extra trip into work to drop us off with bike boxes at the airport for a 4.30 am check in.

We hired a motorhome from near the Hobart airport and on our last day we stayed at this campsite before returning the motorhome in the morning next day

We have used a few Big 4 sites on our week adventure in Tasmania and found them equally good

This site was pre booked and we went to see the site first as we were in the airport Hotel prior to picking up the van

Really friendly staff, and very helpful. We knew our pitch number so that made it easier on our day of arriving. Large pitches and all serviced

Would recommend this site

The park was so clean, the staff went above and beyond to help us take our luggage to the room and the shuttle to the airport was so helpful :) they had a picture hunt around the park which the kids (4 & 6) loved!!

Super friendly staff and a lovely family atmosphere. The air pillow was an absolute highlight for my 3 boys. The amenities were well maintained and despite the park being fully booked there was no queuing. |There was some aircraft and traffic noise but that is to be expected given the location convenient to the airport.

An outstanding experience at Big 4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park.
Special thanks to the manager, Emma, who made us feel genuinely welcome and was incredibly accommodating, especially given how busy it was at this time of year.

The amenities are spotless, the park has a great vibe, and it’s clear from the moment you arrive that it’s extremely well run. That’s a real credit to the management team.

This was our first visit and it certainly won’t be our last. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at this beautiful park. It’s only a short drive into the city and perfectly positioned near the fantastic vineyards around the Richmond area.

Highly recommend.

Cabins Big enough, 2 rooms, a living Room, a well-equipped kitchen.

Beds are really comfy.

Great place to be near the Highway and close to the airport
Great family friendly accommodation,  a wonderful kids playground 😀
It does where you need it for. We only stayed one short night. It is definitely kid friendly
lovely rooms ..big and comfortable and very close to airport . check in experience is very pleasant as the responses was very prompt when we could only arrive after office hours

We stayed at the Big 4 Tourist Park in Hobart in a Cabin, when we arrived in Tasmania recently, and stayed again the night before leaving to go home.  The owners of the Park are very welcoming, friendly and helpful.  The email communication and phone calls while we were trying to book prior to our stay,  were of a very high standard. The Park is very clean and well maintained. The rooms were very clean and tidy and had everything we needed in them. The owners of the Park suggested we try the fresh seafood Café, (Tasmanian Gourmet Seafoods) at the back of the park.  We ended up going there every night we stayed at the Park. I would highly recommend this park to anyone travelling around Tasmania.  We will definitely be staying here again on our next trip.

Nice park , nice ladies in Office .
Just very noisy !!! People in camp kitchen up to 11.30pm & no one on site to shut them up.
It is way better than what you might expect from the location. No shade trees, but lots of well kept grass and clean modern amenities.
Ideal position near the airport, free shuttle available. The lodges were excellent and well equipped. Loads of campervan spaces

Would definitely, recommend. Our recent stay was great.... close to everything, great seafood place within walking distance, only 20mins to Hobart, 7mins to the airport. Our cabin had everything we could want , it was clean and everybody was so helpful. Nothing to complain!
Very close to the airport, very clean with everything you need in a caravan/tourist park. Great location to start from everyday.

The best laid out, cleanest, maintained and designed
caravan/ cabin park in Australia!!!!!! Beautiful camp kitchen.

We stayed here after a later flight. What a surprise! Our cabin was so clean and  was beyond our expectations. Even though reception was closed, getting our key was so easy. Communication from start to finish was fabulous. Highly recommend.

We were late for check-in at 8pm. Anyways easy to find out where is cabin key no.34. It was so comfortable, clean and warm with  heather is on for us. Thank you so much BIG 4 Hobart Airport. Highly recommend :)
We had a powered ensuite site for our motor home. Clean amenities. Jumpy pillow for the kids. Friendly & helpful staff. Great location near the airport.
Perfect for our departure
Very tidy park. Well maintained. Excellent camp kitchen. Great amenities block. Very clean. A great base if you need to be close by the airport or explore Hobart and surrounds.

Multiple stays with our big van, beautiful staff, always happy to go above & beyond with bookings for us. Our sweet girl 'Penny', our English Cocker Spaniel loves her stays with us here too, much appreciated & we will return when next in Hobart, cheers, Janet & Paul.

Nice spot. Under the airport flight path but they never woke us up. Kids loved the bouncy pillow and play ground. Rooms were clean and tidy. Our hair dryer was broken but they quickly sourced us another.
Nice and clean. Has everything you would need.

This place was perfect for our family stop over, all the staff were wonderful,  park was super clean and extremely well maintained,  could not fault a single thing. Thanks to the hard working ladies who made our stay with our son super special.

These guys can not be faulted at all! From the second we required a caravan spot for a month on short notice these guys jumped to the rescue

Very friendly family orientated and a very clean and tidy park! We will definitely be back but next time for a holiday thanks for making this a breeze Jay and Rach site 33
All good and professional made and interesting and informative thanks for your care and attention 👍
Always friendly and accommodating

Clean
Quite (planes)
Central

Very happy with our stay.  Staff were  friendly and the cabin was very clean.  The shower was hot and good pressure. The location was good and central without being in the heart of the city.  We were able to get food easily and definately recommend  The Local Grocer for coffee and food.
Great family friendly park. The kids loved this Big4. Convenient location. Clean facilities

Adding to our previous review after our second stay at this great Holiday Park. This time staying longer for hoilday and work. Our cabin became a home away from home and the staff welcomed us like we were family.
We also took a look at their well appointed genuinely Accessible Cabins that our clients might need. Well done guys :-)
Car Park right outside the cabin is great. Easy access to Hobart, Cambridge Park, Sorell and other locations for business plus all south eastern tourist locations. Surprisingly quiet despite being near the airport.
Has an airport shuttle bus.

We've been here a couple of times now for business mostly, but this time, also for holiday.
The staff are wonderful... helped us a lot when our trip over on the Spirit of Tasmania was delayed by a few days, which threw our business plans out the window and we needed to reschedule. Nothing was too difficult!
The cabins are lovely, clean, well appointed and comfortable (especially the bed... which is always good considering we slept in it for 7 nights).
Would highly recommend.
They also have a couple of beautifully equipped wheelchair friendly cabins.

Very good facilities, great value so close to the city.  We stayed in early June so it wasn’t too busy.  No real issues with aircraft noise, just a couple in the evening but nothing too late.  We took one of the larger powered caravan sites out the back, just be careful of number 28 as it can easily get waterlogged, you can see from the ground there.  Otherwise it was a great base for exploring Hobart, Mount Wellington, Richmond and Port Arthur.  10 minute drive to Sorrel for groceries.

Stayed after late night flight. Cabin was comfortable and well stocked (thank you for that). Came very late in the evening but instructions left by the service team were great and they send mail also with instructions.

Late check in was simple with clear instructions emailed to me prior to arrival , heater in cabin was on for me which i greatly appreciated as was a very cold  night outside. Cabin was spotless and had everything needed i only wish i was staying longer .

Our family stayed in a Llanherne cabin ( 2 Adults & 3 Kids) cabin was perfect for what we needed throughout the stay . Staff were so friendly and helpful and the attention to detail throughout the entire park is a credit to them. Lots for the kids to do with the jumping pillow being a favourite amongst our family. Various dinner options all within walking distance is helpful too. Even though location is approx 3-4 mins from the airport and you do hear the occasional plane it doesn't disturb you at all. Would defiantly go back and stay again.
Great place. Close to Hobart and local areas. Easy access off the hwy.

Pre booked 4 night stay ensuite site with 2 additional nights added on powered site.
Really helpful staff, busy partly due to part park closure during upgrades, ensuite site 10, on the corner, clean and well appointed bathroom, heating via a light fitting would definitely improve it.
Our only issue was the cabin parking opposite all sites, it made it difficult to reverse onto site plus we moved our car so our neighbours on 9 with a very large van could exit their site without hitting a car. We had a grassed site next, large , 8 metres square. Positioned behind the units facing the highway. Easy access to the amenities, all of which including the laundry were spotless and well maintained.
Park is easy access to Hobart and surrounding  attractions. There is some aircraft noise being next to the airport but it didn’t disturb our nights and there was minimal traffic noise which was surprising.
We returned for another 2 nights as we traversed north to south and would highly recommend the park for convenience, cleanliness and excellent staff.

We've had multiple stays over the last month using the self contained cabins. Cannot fault the amenities nor the fabulous staff. The laundry was spotless. Play equipment, for those that have kids, is great. Close and convenient to the CBD and an easy drive in any direction for travel beyond and sightseeing. Highly recommend.

We stayed here for four nights at a grass powered site. The campsite was maintained, relatively flat, and clean. The location of the amenities was well thought out — not too far for any guest — and the facilities themselves were regularly maintained. Overall, it was a great camping experience.

However, possibly due to the campground being near the airport, the wind was extremely strong. On two of the nights, wind speeds reached over 50 km/h, and staying in a tent during those hours felt quite scary, like the tent could be blown away at any moment. That said, when the wind wasn’t strong, the environment was pleasant and very convenient.

We had our first campervan stay at a holiday park, and it was a fantastic experience. Arriving just in time for a stunning sunset set the perfect tone for our stay. It’s close to seven miles beach. The facilities were spotless, and we especially appreciated the heated bathroom as we stayed during winter. There are playgrounds for kids, which we got to enjoy. Shootin hoops on the basketball court to stay active and warm. It was a great way to unwind after a day of travel.
Great location near airport, clean and spacious, very comfortable experience.
Considering this is right near the airport the place was very quiet. Amenities were fine, not the best but fine for one night. Late arrival check in was super easy.
Very accommodating, large space for caravan and car. Amenities are good sizes.

Family of 5 stayed 2 nights. The cabins were very clean, spacious and well maintained. The laundry facilities were very clean aswell. We were impressed by the kitchen area. Location excellent, convenient to the airport.  Staff were polite and very obliging. Excellent place to stay. Recommended.

Great stay if you are looking for convenience, a gateway to Hobart and clean amenities. Bonus points for a good playground and jumping pillow for the kids. We had a lovely grass site and they ate clearing putting in the work to keep the grass looking great. Thanks for a pleasant stay while we explored!

The staff member on checkin was efficient and pleasant. Disappointed with our motorhome site though—small, uninviting, and poorly maintained, especially compared to the well-reviewed cabins. Our original spot near the entrance was particularly unappealing, ie a small patch of dirt and concrete slab, and while my approach to reception later in the morning accommodated a site change, (I indicated we had a 4 night stay booked), the response at that time felt more obligatory than welcoming. Apparently, upgrades are coming, but that didn’t help our stay. Wouldn’t return until improvements are made, and wouldn't recommend the sites near the entrance. Excellent amenities.
So convenient, little people friendly, very clean and comfortable rooms and quiet. Best check in ever.

Stayed for 5 nights. Staff are friendly and helpful. Amenities are clean. Camp kitchen was great. Location is perfect to do a quick trip into Hobart or out to anywhere around the city. Stayed before and would recommend.

One of the best caravan parks we have stayed at.
Amenities are spotless and great showers.
Camp kitchen is with out a doubt the best we have seen.
Friendly staff and extremely professional.

Location is 20 minutes drive from Hobart right between the airport and the freeway.
If you don't mind the noise of aircraft taking off and landing from 6 on the morning or the constant drone of traffic on the adjacent freeway, you will be fine.
Showers and toilet numbers were inadequate during our stay with the 3 of each regularly full reach morning and evening.
Good showers

Park staff and management were amazing, providing us with great options for our two sites.
Felt like we were staying in a rural area, but the Park is only 10 minutes from anything we needed in terms of shopping.
Hobart's only 15 minutes away.
Easy access off and onto the highway.
Concrete sites for the caravans with grass adjacent.
Plenty of space for everyone.
Amenities look like they were built yesterday; in fact the entire Park looks almost brand new.
The only place to stay. Hidden gem. Well run. Very clean. Great amenities. Easy access. Lovely people. Perfect for the kids. Can't praise highly enough.
We rented a cabin. It was comfortable and had everything we needed. We arrived late at night, and it was easy to figure out how to check in and get to our room.

One of the best campsites for campervans. Big space. Clean amenities. If this is your first stop, do check out their kitchen where campers may leave food/basic items which they did not manage to use up: cooking oil, condiments, hand towels, toilet rolls etc. Kitchen is air-conditioned with reading and games corner. There are outdoor grill with two tables for outdoor dining. The playground is also by far the best - jumping pillow for the kids to use up their energy; basketball court; swings; playground. There is a small dog park too.
Great guest facilities

We were very impressed with this cabin and park. The staff were very helpfull at all times . The cabin we had was fault less . The location great next to the airport . No problems with aircraft noise. Close to shopping and only 20mins to Hobart city. We had 3 seniors and two bedrooms which had a double bed in each room.. price was fair ..ww stayed 10 nights. Will stay again next time we are here. Ps the facilities in the park were excellent.. john drake..
Für die letzte Nacht vor einem langen Rückflug zB nach Europa ruhig bequem viel Platz und überraschend free Shuttle zum Flughafen. Essen, Bar im benachbarten Hotel oder an der Tankstelle auf Sicht.

If you’re after a getaway that combines the serenity of nature with the charm of a good laugh, look no further than Big4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park. The moment you arrive, you're greeted by Emma, she's not just a manager – shes the heart and soul of the place, ensuring your stay is both relaxed and thoroughly entertained.

Need help with anything? Emma is the answer. Lost your key? No problem – Emma will find it with the precision of a detective. Asking about local attractions? Emma has a list, and she’ll give it to you with a story so entertaining, you’ll wonder if she is secretly a tour guide. She's helpful, friendly, and always up for a good chat, turning a regular stay into a memorable experience.

As for the cleaners? Let’s just say they are "sufficiently" efficient, ensuring the cabins and caravans are sparkling clean without you needing to lift a finger. Nothing too fancy, just practical and well-done, which is exactly what you want when you're kicking back and enjoying the great outdoors. Your cabin will be spotless, and you won’t be left wondering if the floor was ever wiped (it was).

All in all,  Big4 Hobart Airport Tourist Park offers the perfect mix of comfort, cleanliness, and comedy. You’ll leave not only with memories of the stunning views but also with a few good laughs, thanks to Emma. Highly recommend for those who want a little extra “sparkle” in their holiday!

Great Caravan Park very well maintained clean modern facilities
Would stay here again

Stayed there for two nights. Would highly recommend. Located conveniently on the airports doorstep but still quiet at night. Rooms are clean and have everything you need. BBQ facilities were clean and well maintained. Loved the fact that they have the communal kitchen where you can leave left over basics, that you can't take with you on the plane or travelling. Brilliant idea.

Emma and her team have been absolutely fabulous. After a serious accident in central Tas, an ambulance ride to Hobart hospital, and then requiring back and spine surgery, she managed to find a way and found us a space for the van- in the busiest time of the year for her park- and extended it so  the full recovery and pain management plan could be conducted. She, and her team, have been simply wonderful for us, they have gone above and beyond simple park management.
Meanwhile, she got on with all the Christmas preparations, keeping the park absolutely spotless, as well as a game of backyard cricket on Xmas day (we didn't play).
A fabulous park, very well managed, and they have displayed incredible human empathy in our case. Can't rate them highly enough. Where can I give a sixth star?
Great spot for a getaway 👌
Výhodné před odletem a odevzdáním karavanu. Vše je čisté a udržované. Doporučuji navštívit i při příjezdu. V kuchyňce zůstává po odjíždějících turistech dost užitečných věcí
Powered campsite is clean and convenient. Common areas (kitchen, washrooms, laundry room etc) are clean and neat. Beautiful scenery and layout is good. Definitely will visit again

Park is very clean and well maintained. Good facilities and staff are friendly. Roadways are a bit narrow if trying to back a large caravan onto site. Some noise from local airport, but not excessive.

Very helpful and pleasant staff. Thank you Amanda. Good cabin and transfer to airport for us. We were able to leave our vehicles in lockup while we went to Melbourne for a funeral. We then got transfer back to big 4 to pick up our vehicles. $5 per day for our vehicles. Great service and I would highly recommend this caravan park.

A well equipped and very comfy chalet. Check-in went smoothly.
We only spent one night, because the next day we had a flight. Definitely would have loved to spend much more days at the BIG4 Hobart.
We spent a couple of nights here in a motor home. Great facilities a wonderful park.
Always have the best time when we stay here, Couldnt ask for more helpful staff they are forever going out of their way to make sure our stay is a memorable one. Highly recommend staying here

Great place to come stay !! Amenities were immaculate and great cooking facilities . The staff were fantastic especially loved the new addition of the dog area they have added. Will definitely be back to stay.
The camp kitchen and BBQ facilities were immaculate. Ensuite was very clean and site size was generous.  Staff have been friendly and helpful.  😀

Very clean, comfortable and well maintained accommodation. Reasonably priced, great access to the airport, and to get around if you're exploring.
Warm room on a cold night, great little kitchenette and playground for the kids.
No highway noise at night although you could hear aircraft departing obviously being so close. Plane noise didn't disturb my sleep or my kids sleep.
Great campsite with good amenities
Well maintained park, nice camp sites, and great access to the highway.
Super modern and clean caravan park. Great amenities.
Clean and friendly staff
Out of all Australia- This park is the cleanest and staff so helpful and nice without being to much. Definitely worth staying here. When down Hobart make this your go to place. ✅
Great place to stay, staff are awesome and loved staying there
Fantastic caravan park, conveniently located with clean amenities and friendly staff. We stayed for a week in our caravan. The powered site we had was spacious and level. Highly recommend.

Great prices, friendly staff, very clean amenities. Easy parking for caravans.
Totally recommend.

Great park, stayed in a cabin. Great staff. Fresh and tidy, had a few renovations that were a bit untidy though like lights replaced etc that weren't redone well and a few untidy patch jobs on walls etc, but overall a great cabin. Great location, easy to jump on the main roads and go anywhere. Would stay again without hesitation.

It's a great place, immaculately clean & wonderful staff.
A bit of airport & highway noise, but not enough to not want to stay again. Give them a go !
The staff is amicable, and the facilities are pretty standard. Coins can be changed at the office. It has a very well-established playground there. My kids like the bouncy pillow very much.
Great location and comfortable, affordable clean stay.
The facilities are top notch. Right next to the airport.

Deze camping heeft moderne faciliteiten. Het is zeer dicht bij het vliegveld maar het geluid is niet hinderlijk. De sites kunnen wat sfeervoller worden gemaakt. Er is weinig groen op de camping. Vervelend is dat je elke keer een sleutel mee moet nemen als je naar het toilet wil.
Very convenient and well clean maintenance kitchen.
Good place to stay if you want to be out of the hustle and bustle

Rooms and park are fantastic
Bit noisy in the morning being so close to the airport
OK, if you're a morning person.
Very close to the airport.

Friendly staff
Amazing facilities
Very clean
Great for caravans
Bonnes prestation globalement, rien à dire.
stayed a couple weeks ago! amazing clean rooms, very tidy. staff was so helpful and super friendly, would recommend and stay again
I will definitely be back, best experience i’ve had at a park !!

Love this park, stayed many times and it always feels like a second home.  Welcomed at reception by Amanda, always friendly and full of local knowledge. Well run park with improvements happening all the time. Emma and her team are a credit to the BIG4 brand.

This is a nice modern & well presented park so close to the airport but surprisingly very quiet. Sites are good size & cabins are modern & well stocked. Staff are very friendly  & helpful. They have a free airport shuttle too. Great position if needing the airport or to base yourself here to explore Hobart & surrounds. We enjoyed our stay here and highly recommend.

Nice place . 7 min drive to secluded beach. Walkable distance to bp and subway.
Comfy stay. Cabins could do with more brighter furnishing.
Not great to do to much cooking in cabin.
Friendly staff. Debbie was very helpful with linens
Enjoyed the jumping pillow.

The park is very modern. It has a great bbq area and camp kitchen. Its more of a basic big 4 but price was reasonable.

Sites were reasonable size but a little tight to get in, in the sites near the cabins. Park is very clean. My son loved the Christmas lights. Yes you can here the planes but they don't go all night.

There are a few negatives. You only have one key for the bathroom which is not helpful if someone else on your site needs the bathroom.

It's a fair way out of Hobart but a good central point for Richmond & port Arthur.

Would have been good if they did a shuttle bus into the city for new years eve as it lacked transport for this.

The lady at the office is bit abrupt too.

We would definitely recommend this park. The office staff were very helpful and nothing was too much bother for them  from the original booking to the final checkout. Our powered site was a good size and the amenities were always clean. The unit our daughters stayed in was a good size, was clean and had everything they need to enjoy their stay.

We had our van so booked a site. This park is very clean, tidy and well presented at all times. Credit to all involved.
Great facilities, play area for the kids, great camp kitchen.
Would totally recommend.
Very nice and new carvan park.. super clean amenities and camp kitchen..
Air craft over head but not a problem. All great facilities with cement parking with grass beside.

Terribly noisy. As if the cars of the highway and the airplanes weren't enough, there's terrible music in the showers and some awfully noisy vending machines and blow up santa in the kitchen. Also lots of light at night. Totally unnecessary. My worst stay in tasmania

Ideal location for a stay with convenient access to a service station and Subway nearby. Spacious bathrooms, ample play areas for kids, proximity to the airport, rental van/car services, and a complimentary airport shuttle make it a fantastic choice.

We stopped over one night before returning our campervan close by. The facilities were excellent, including clean amenities and hot showers. The park is close to the airport and only a 15-minute drive to Hobart.
More than 1 key for the shower/bathroom block would be helpful for those in campervans, as you need to wait for others you are with to return so you can take the key to get in.

Decided to stay here after picking up our camper rental. Close to the airport and rental companies so easy access. Did not find airport noise excessive . Reception staff are friendly and helpful.

Sites are large but expect people to short cut through your site to get to amenities. Amenities are clean. Laundry available. It's quite open with little shelter so if windy, you'll know.

Great kitchen set up, provide toaster ovens, air fryer, cooktops, sinks for washing up, etc. Seating and TV also available. Two BBQs set up in outdoor shelter, also with seating and sink. One of the better dump spots as provide hand washing set up as well as sanitizer.

My biggest stress is getting to the airport in good time. This park was recommended by a friend and I'm so happy that we took his advice. Super close to the airport, no worries or stress about trying to navigate traffic. Clean rooms, super comfy good sized beds. A walk to a lovely fish and chip supper and a walk to a lovely breakfast buffet. Freindly and helpful. 10 out of 10. Will be back.

We arrived late on the Friday, keys were left for us. Cabin was cosy, warm, as air con was on, and it was cold. Shower facilities good. Beds comfortable.  No storage space in 2nd bedroom and window side if bed has no PowerPoint for bedside lamp. Outdoor light not working and no  hivis tape on step edge. This nearly led to a fall. Close to airport and not too noisy considering this.

Stayed here for the weekend with my girlfriends to use as a base for my hens weekend! The cabins were exactly what we needed. Perfectly clean, great value for money and a very ideal location when you're flying in and out in a short period of time.
Will definitely stay here again. :)
We stayed overnight in our motorhome there last week. The amenities were good. Our children have fun playing at the playground. Once all the plants grow mature, this holiday park will be perfect!

Great holiday park for the family. Facilities were clean and well maintained. Our cabin was very comfortable. Aircraft noise is to be expected, however we did not find the noise intrusive during our stay, it certainly didnt keep us awake. Staff were excellent, The kids playground area and jumping pillow were clean & well maintained
Staff are very friendly, facilities are clean and fantastic, next trip to Tasmania! I'll be  using this Big4 as base, but Hobart, it's self is magic 🎩
Super helpful lady at desk. Clean and safe.

Only stayed for 1 night. We had an ensuite site in a camper. We were pleasantly surprised to see the size of the ensuite with towels and toiletries supplied. Close to the airport on arrival. Maybe one of the down sides are the aircraft during the night. Wont hesitate to book again. Couldnt believe what we got for the price👍
One of the nicest cabins we have ever stayed in. After a long flight the cabin was warm and cosy. Best sleep ever.
Love this place. Clean, convenient and wonderful staff. Quiet location, even though it is next to the airport. I’d definitely stay here again.
Right under the departure route for aircraft, however the ensuite sites are nice and clean.
Good service and neat clean rooms

A fantastic holiday park for the family. Facilities are clean and well maintained. Our cabin was spacious and very comfortable during our stay. While it's close to the airport, aircraft noise is to be expected, however we did not find the noise intrusive during our stay. Staff were excellent during our stay. There's free WiFi, while it's not fast it is sufficient for web browsing and basic video streaming (provided the resolution is kept around 720p). The only real negative was the cabin TV, the local channels reception was spotty and there's no smart TV/streaming capabilities, so we were down to sharing a tablet/phone screens amongst us. The kids playground area and jumping pillow were clean, also well maintained kept the kids entertained.

Overall it's great value for money and well recommended for those visiting Tassie.

Sadly, so far this was one of the WORST BIG 4’s accommodation wise. OUTSIDE facility wise - no complaints - but the cabins were an extreme let down I have sadly ever stayed at - unsure if there are others around but in this, I was very very disappointed (accommodation wise) and unless this BIG 4 is seriously upgraded then I will not be returning to this Big 4 anytime soon.
The accommodations were beautifully laid out exterior wise and easy to find and locate and within walking distance to all amenities, presentation of the outside and the playground were immaculate but that is where the compliments need to stop.
I attended this accommodation on Thursday 6th July and checked out Saturday 8 July 2023 - we had a very rushed and badly put together holiday by my NDIS Disability Support Co Ordinator - we were travelling with 2 x female support workers for myself with mobility issues and my 10-year-old Autistic son.
The cabins in this park were WOEFULLY small and cramped. Barely any lounge room space for 4 people which the L Shape is badly designed and insufficient seating for all in the cabin (one had to sit at the outdated dining table on a very old and uncomfortable chair). If these cabins were to be salvaged, they would need to be internally upgraded and made for a “couple “and no kids and or a business person travelling and needing urgent accommodations.
We had maybe 2 x occasions where we heard aeroplanes either departing or arriving that quite loud (noise travelling), and we were at one point worried that no one would get any sleep overnight from that noise. But thankfully we did not bar those two times (mostly because we were out during the day) so there might have been more times it was possibly heard during the day.
All the cabins need to be upgraded and they need to get in some 3 and or 4-bedroom cabins.
There was barely any cooking equipment to cook any type of meals, we all had to squeeze past each other enroute to toilet or bedrooms if anyone was in kitchenette (not a full kitchen) and again only a Microwave to cook in. Also. the instructions on using the electric hot plate were very poor for someone not familiar on how to use an inverter electric hot plate.
I was disappointed that given the urgency of the situation for our accommodations for disability support needs that we had a last-minute accommodation change to include the extra support worker that these accommodations had to breach SECTION 11 of the Disability Discrimination Act 1992 and charged us an Extra $50.00 for the extra support worker staying with us!!  The Big 4 in Launceston did not charge us extra at all – for a paid worker - we could understand if an extra bed had to be found and pulled out and installed to accommodate her but this was not the case. We gave Launceston a Glowing review compared to this one.
We were handed DVD player to “install and set up ourselves “and then went to the camp Kitchen to find there were    barely any type of DVDs to watch - most of it was wrestling or Boxing!!! DEFINATELY NEED A bigger AND better CHOICE OF DVDs to select from.
We had an RV and had the ensuite site. Perfect! Very clean facilities and park.

I can't thank the very friendly staff enough for our first experience with Big4. Everything we requested for three children under five during our stay was in place.  Our Cabin was very clean, warm and inviting.  The children's playground was a big plus, especially while waiting for transport to arrive. All round,  we were very happy with our stay there, and will definitely be coming back again.
Thanks for the help with our credit Shell, fantastic customer service
Excellent rooms. They have all you need great showers comfy beds and pillows and rooms are quite modern and spacious... highly recommend
設備齊全，地點近機場，非常方便，環境空氣也好，雖然房較細，但也不錯。
